chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D- 1240 of 2015: Faqeer Mumtaz Ali Bhutto vs. Deputy Commissioner Larkana & others. For the Petitioner: Petitioner-in-person. For the Respondents: Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A.G. Dates of hearing: 16.02.2022. Date of announcement: 16.02.2022. ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitioner had written a letter seeking construction of a tomb / mausoleum in his village and the said letter was converted into a petition, vide order dated 20.10.2015. This petition has been pending for almost seven years and when it came up for hearing today, the petitioner was asked to demonstrate any Constitutional / vested right to seek the relief claimed, however, he remained singularly unable to articulate a single cogent justification in such regard. It is considered opportune to conclude the present matter by restricting ourselves to observing that in the absence of any demonstrable fundamental / vested right to the relief claimed, no case is made out before us to perpetuate this lis, hence, this petition is hereby dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
